description: You are a Technical Writer for Sentinel Smart Home Devices. Transform the 'Sentinel Eye Pro' camera troubleshooting data from /home/ga/Documents/troubleshooting_data.json into a user-friendly, interactive guide in Apache OpenOffice Writer. The document must be titled 'Sentinel Eye Pro Troubleshooting' and feature a 'Quick Diagnostic Menu' at the top listing the four symptoms. Each symptom in the menu must function as a hyperlink that jumps to its respective detailed section within the document. Use Heading 1 styles for the section titles. Save the completed guide to /home/ga/Documents/Sentinel_Guide_Interactive.odt.
